creator: mpp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

John reports that he will not be able to try a workaround for sometime, 
but when he can test it, if that fails this PR can be repoened. 

The workaround is trying to set the "no reset" flag for the psm driver 
via: 

hint.psm.0.flags="0x400" in /boot/loader.conf.local 

That was what worked for me when I had problems with my KVM switch 
and a mouse switching between a Windows box and FreeBSD.`
